title: Remove the deprecated sync database session
summary: The app runs entirely on async SQLAlchemy, but a deprecated sync engine, SessionLocal, and get_db() still linger — kept alive mainly by the test fixtures. Migrate the remaining consumers to async and delete the sync path.
motivation: Eliminate the dead dual-session foot-gun now that async is the only runtime path; the sync get_db() is already marked DEPRECATED. Salvaged from closed PR #8 (feature/service-layer-refactor).

included: Migrate backend/tests/conftest.py fixtures (the sync test_db_session) and any tests that use it to an async session
Remove the get_db() dependency override from the test client setup
Delete the sync create_engine, SessionLocal, and get_db() from app/database/database.py once no app or test code depends on them
excluded: Changing async session behavior, connection pooling, or the DATABASE_URL contract
Changing Alembic migration execution (its own engine is out of scope)
Any API, router, or auth behavior change

design_facts.stack: SQLAlchemy 2.0 async is the sole runtime path (create_async_engine/AsyncSession/get_async_db). A deprecated sync create_engine/SessionLocal/get_db remains only for legacy and test fixtures; conftest currently overrides get_db and drives tests off a sync test_db_session.

work_items.title: Move test fixtures to async sessions
work_items.summary: Convert conftest's sync test_db_session (and the tests that use it) to an async session so the suite no longer depends on the sync path, without changing what any test asserts.

exposes.note: Test-harness change only; no app runtime surface changes.

behavior: conftest provides an async DB session fixture that tests use instead of the sync test_db_session
No test imports or overrides the sync get_db, SessionLocal, or sync create_engine
The full backend test suite passes on the async fixtures with the same assertions

oracle.command: make test-backend-lint && make test-backend-format && make test-backend-types && cd backend && uv run pytest -q
assertions: The full backend suite passes using async DB fixtures.
No test references the sync get_db, SessionLocal, or sync create_engine.

work_items.title: Delete the sync engine and get_db()
work_items.summary: Remove the sync create_engine, SessionLocal, and get_db() from database.py and any lingering get_db dependency override, now that only the async path remains in use.

exposes.note: database.py exposes only the async engine/session factory and get_async_db.

behavior: app/database/database.py has no sync create_engine, SessionLocal, or get_db()
No dependency_overrides[get_db] remains in the test setup
The app starts cleanly and the backend suite passes

signals: capability:remove the sync database session path

oracle.command: make test-backend-lint && make test-backend-format && make test-backend-types && cd backend && uv run pytest tests/unit/database/test_database.py tests/unit/database/test_init_db.py -v
assertions: database.py exposes only the async session path — no create_engine, SessionLocal, or get_db remains.
The database unit tests pass with the sync path removed.
